feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Cloud
feed.subtitle: ABAP Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: EML Get Permission from SAP BO ( Billing )
entry.content:
Hello,

I have developed a custom app on the public cloud ( developer extensibility ).

I use the I_BILLINGDOCUMENTTP-CreateFromExternalData action (SAP Business Accelerator Hub - I_BILLINGDOCUMENTTP)
Furthermore I have set up two roles, one being able to execute the function via the Sales-Billing Document catalog (user "write"), the other being only able to create data in my app but not trigger the function above (user "read").
(Billing Document | SAP Help Portal)
If the read user performs the action, the eml fails and i can catch the error. (so far so good)
My intention now is to check if he is allowed to use the action via the global features method and disable the button if he is not.

I know that there is the GET PERMISSION ONLY GLOBAL AUTHORIZATION .... feature, but it returns true for all inputs on my end.
If I check the SAP implementation of I_BillingDocument~CreateFromExternalData, i can see, that the global authtorization method is not implemented and instead works with authorization context.
I can see there and in the business catalog for "write" (SAP_BCR_SD_BIL_DOC_PC) the required authorization objects.
Some of the authorization objects are not cloud ready and therefore cannot be used.

So my question is:
How do I check if the user can use the CreateFromExternalData action without using it in the first place?

entry.title: Send mail with multiple attachment after po is getting released in fexible workflow
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a requirement where we need to trigger mail with excel and pdf attachment after all the approvers approve po in flexible workflow from my inbox

 

I'm not sure how to move forward with this. Please help

entry.title: Released API DDLS Was Deleted ATC Error in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Despite Object No Longer
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I am facing compatibility ATC errors during ATC checks.

The following ATC errors are raised:

  • Released API DDLS ZDD_SD_TEST was deleted

  • Released API DDLS ZDD_SD_OPENORDERITEM was deleted

  • Released API DDLS ZDD_SD_DELIVERY was deleted

Error example:

Changes in ZSD (DEVC), compared to version 100 (CG4), found by component BC-SRV-APS-EXT-REL:
Released API DDLS ZDD_SD_TEST was deleted.

Background:

  • These CDS views were previously released as APIs (C1 contract).

  • The CDS views no longer exist in the system.

  • When searching in ADT (Ctrl+Shift+A), the objects cannot be found.

  • In the "Manage API Snapshots" application, I cannot find these CDS views in the current SAP Default snapshot.

  • However, the compatibility ATC check still reports them as deleted APIs.

I found SAP KBA 3442779 which explains that released APIs may remain in historical API snapshots and can continue to trigger compatibility checks even after deletion.

My questions are:

  1. How can I identify the exact snapshot that still contains these deleted CDS views?

  2. If the objects no longer exist and were never delivered to customers, what is the recommended way to remove these compatibility findings?

  3. Is setting the default snapshot to "Not Check Relevant" the only solution, or is there another recommended approach?

  4. Has anyone experienced a similar issue with deleted released CDS views in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

Any guidance would be appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: RAP FIori Element: Single field in FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE not stretching to full width
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a Fiori Elements object page with multiple facets. One of the facets ("Reason") contains only a single multiline text field using #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE.

The problem is the section renders in a narrow column (~1/5 of the page width) instead of stretching full width.

> I am using OData V4.

Current annotation:

{ position: 2,
id: 'Reason',
purpose: #STANDARD,
targetQualifier: 'ReasonQualifier',
type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
label: 'Reason' }

...

@ui.fieldGroup: [ { qualifier: 'ReasonQualifier', position: 10 } ]
@UI.multiLineText: true
ReasonText;

 What I tried:

1) cssDefault.width` on fieldGroup -- no effect

@ui.fieldGroup: [ { qualifier: 'ReasonQualifier', position: 100, cssDefault.width: '100%' } ]
or
@UI.fieldGroup: [ { qualifier: 'ReasonQualifier', position: 100, cssDefault.width: '10rem' } ]

2) #COLLECTION with parentId -- no effect

  { position: 2,                       
    id: 'ReasonCollection',
    purpose: #STANDARD,
    type: #COLLECTION,
    label: 'Reason' },

  { position: 21,                      
    id: 'ReasonQualifier',
    purpose: #STANDARD,
    parentId: 'ReasonCollection', 
    targetQualifier: 'ReasonQualifier',
    type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
    label: '' },

Question:
How can I make a single multiline text fieldgroup field stretch to full width using only backend CDS/metadata annotations? Is there any standard SAP annotation that controls this?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to extend manage customer line items app in clean core way to add other standard logical fields
entry.content:
Hello, 

Another blocker of clean core way. 
We are trying to extend the manage customer line items app to have few more fields from other data sources . 


extending the i_arlineitem cds view with those fields  does not reflect in the data source extension of CFL to enable them In app. 

we created a custom app on top of i_arlineitem which is released C0 contract . Now the issue we are facing is in ATC check level 2 warning of “Usage of internal API” is coming and blocking this custom app way also . 

Can anyone please help in adding other data source field in this manage customer line app or help in fixing that atc check .

entry.title: Help with package creation
entry.content:
Hi Community. I am newly learning sap abap programing and was trying to create a package but when I click on next option it wont allow me progress further with the package creation also shows no error. Currently using the BTP trial version on eclipse

When I click on next it wont allow me to proceed ahead.
Could please help, I am newly learning the tool.

entry.title: Recommended naming convention for custom objects in ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working with ABAP Cloud in the context of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, and I would like to understand the recommended naming convention for custom development objects.

In classic ABAP development, custom objects are usually created using the Z* or Y* namespace, or a registered customer namespace. However, in ABAP Cloud, I would like to know what the recommended approach is for naming custom artifacts such as:

- Packages
- Classes and interfaces
- CDS views / CDS view entities
- Behavior definitions and behavior implementations
- Service definitions and service bindings
- Metadata extensions

Is there an SAP-recommended naming convention or best practice for these objects in ABAP Cloud?

For example, should we continue using Z*/Y*, use a specific prefix per application/domain, or follow a different convention aligned with Clean Core and ABAP Cloud development guidelines?

Any official SAP documentation, examples, or practical recommendations would be very helpful.

Thank you.

entry.title: RAP - Behavior projection - Error on activating Behavior projection
entry.content:
Hi All,  

Managed scenario - Created three levels of RAP BO.

Behavior definition is successfully activated however could not able to activate the "Behavior Projection".  Follwing is the error under ADT Problem - 

The association "_CUSTOMER" cannot be used as a transactional association since the target entity "ZSRA_R_CUSTTP" is not redirected to "ZSRA_C_CUST" in the CDS definition.

define root view entity  ZSRA_C_CUST
 provider contract transactional_query
  as projection on  ZSRA_CUSTTP
{
  key CustomerId,
      CustomerName,
      CreatedBy,
      CreatedAt,
      LastChangedBy,
      ChdLocalLastChangedAt,
      LastChangedAt,
      /* Assoziationen */
      _project : redirected to composition child ZSRA_C_PRJ
}

------------

define view entity ZSRA_C_PRJ
  as projection on ZSRA_R _PRJTP
{
  key CustomerId,
  key ProjectId,
      ProjectName,
      Project,
      ProjectType,
      Data,
      Exporter,
      CreatedBy,
      CreatedAt,
      LastChangedBy,
      PrjLocalLastChangedAt,
      LastChangedAt,
      /* Associations */
      _customer : redirected to parent /OSGMBH/ ZSRA_C_CUST,
      _sys: redirected to composition child ZSRA_C_SYS

}

 ------------
define view entity ZSRA_C_SYS as projection on ZSRA_ R_SYS
{
    key ProjectId,
key SystemId,
    key CustomerId,
    SystemName,
    Service,
    Tenant,
    CreatedBy,
    CreatedAt,
    LastChangedBy,
    SysLocalLastChangedAt,
    LastChangedAt,
    /* Associations */
    _project: redirected to parent  ZSRA_C_PRJ,
     _customer
}

Behavior Projection –

projection;
strict ( 2 );
use draft;
define behavior for ZSRA_C_CUST alias Customer
{
  use create;
  use update;
  use delete;
  use action Edit;
  use action Activate;
  use action Discard;
use action Resume;
  use action Prepare;
use association _project { create; with draft; }
}

define behavior for ZSRA_C_PRJ alias Project
{
  use update;
  use delete;
  use association _customer { with draft; }
  use association _sys { create; with draft; }
}
define behavior for ZSRA_C_SYS alias System
{
  use update;
  use delete;
  use association _project { with draft; }
  use association _customer { with draft; } <-- Error
}

Thanks & regards

Shobhan Rana

entry.title: How AI is affecting SAP world in day-to-day work
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm trying to understand how AI is changing the work of SAP consultants and developers in real world projects.

I'd appreciate hearing about your experience with AI tools in your respective domains.

  • Which AI tools do you use regularly? (Joule, GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude, etc)
  • What kind of tasks became easier for you because of these tools?
  • Which technologies are your clients or companies adopting?
  • Which AI skills do you think SAP professionals should learn over the next few years?

    I'm interested in practical experiences rather than marketing information.

entry.title: Error DD_ABAP_LANG_VERS011: Customizing-Includes are not allowed in ABAP language version 5
entry.content: Hello SAP Community, I am currently working on an enhancement project in our SAP S/4HANA 2023 On-Premise system. I am trying to add a custom field (ZZ001) by including it in the standard structure CI_COBL. However, when I attempt to activate the structure CI_COBL, the system throws the following error: "Customizing-Includes are not allowed in ABAP language version 5" Message No. DD_ABAP_LANG_VERS011 I have verified that my custom data element and domain definitions are correct. It appears that the ABAP language version setting for this object is restricting the use of traditional Customizing Includes. Could anyone advise on the best practice for handling this in S/4HANA 2023 OP? Should I try to change the language version of CI_COBL via the Object Directory Entry (SE03/SE11)? Or is there a recommended alternative approach (e.g., using Append Structures or BAdIs) compatible with Language Version 5? Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Error in activating /DMO/FLIGHT pulled from ABAPGIT. (Cloud).
entry.content:
After pulling the /dmo/flight/ FROM abapgit (Flight Reference Model) I am getting an error while activating the objects.

Could someone let me know how to fix this. The class exists in the pulled repository.

entry.title: CDS View Delta Annotation Error
entry.content: We are in need of creating CDS view with CDC functionality, however we are getting error during activation like "not supported" and annotations are in red color as in the attached file.

entry.title: Issue in activating ZDMO_RAP_GENERATOR in ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
In Cloud ABAP RAP I have pulled the abapgit files from cloud-abap-rap/README.md at main · SAP-samples/cloud-abap-rap · GitHub.

However, when I try to activate the ZDMO_RAP_GENERATOR I have errors in activation.

Can someone provide a solution to activate the ZDMO_RAP_GENERATOR.

entry.title: Internal Manage Early Numbering
entry.content:
METHOD earlynumbering_create.
    "Declare Variable First
    DATA: number_range_key               TYPE cl_numberrange_runtime=>nr_number,
          number_range_return_code       TYPE cl_numberrange_runtime=>nr_returncode,
          number_range_returned_quantity TYPE cl_numberrange_runtime=>nr_quantity.

    LOOP AT entities into DATA(ls_entity).
        "Try Calling The Method First
        TRY.
            cl_numberrange_runtime=>number_get(
              EXPORTING
                nr_range_nr       = '01'
                object            = 'ZCLA'
                quantity          = 1
                toyear            = ls_entity-Fiscalyear
              IMPORTING
                number            = number_range_key
                returncode        = number_range_return_code
                returned_quantity = number_range_returned_quantity
            ).
          "Catch the error into the message
          CATCH cx_nr_object_not_found INTO DATA(lx_not_found).
              APPEND VALUE #(  %cid      = ls_entity-%cid
                               %key      = ls_entity-%key
                               %msg      = lx_not_found
                            ) TO reported-zi_cla_exp_header.
              APPEND VALUE #(  %cid      = ls_entity-%cid
                               %key      = ls_entity-%key
                            ) TO failed-zi_cla_exp_header.
            RETURN.
          CATCH cx_number_ranges INTO DATA(lx_ranges).
            APPEND VALUE #(  %cid      = ls_entity-%cid
                               %key      = ls_entity-%key
                               %msg      = lx_ranges
                            ) TO reported-zi_cla_exp_header.
              APPEND VALUE #(  %cid      = ls_entity-%cid
                               %key      = ls_entity-%key
                            ) TO failed-zi_cla_exp_header.
            RETURN.
        ENDTRY.
        ls_entity-NumClaim = number_range_key+14(6).
        "Append value to the table
        APPEND VALUE #( %cid      = ls_entity-%cid
                        %key      = ls_entity-%key
                      ) TO mapped-zi_cla_exp_header.
    ENDLOOP.

  ENDMETHOD.

 

I have created  an early numbering implementation method like this. But it seems when I want to create data, it always output an error like below

I've already tried manual numbering insert by hard code it in the method. What should i do? Is there anyway i can check the append to the mapped-zi_cla_exp_header.?

I will attached the table definition also 

@EndUserText.label : 'Custom Table for Claim Expense Header'
@AbapCatalog.enhancement.category : #NOT_EXTENSIBLE
@AbapCatalog.tableCategory : #TRANSPARENT
@AbapCatalog.deliveryClass : #A
@AbapCatalog.dataMaintenance : #RESTRICTED
define table zcla_exp_h {

  key client         : abap.clnt not null;
  key num_claim      : abap.numc(6) not null;
  name               : abap.char(64);
  description        : abap.char(128);
  datefrom           : abap.dats;
  dateto             : abap.dats;
  fiscalyear         : gjahr;
  companycode        : bukrs;
  costcenter         : kostl;
  created_by         : abp_creation_user;
  created_at         : abp_creation_tstmpl;
  last_changed_by    : abp_lastchange_user;
  last_changed_at    : abp_lastchange_tstmpl;
  local_last_changed : abp_locinst_lastchange_tstmpl;

}
@EndUserText.label : 'Custom Table for Claim Expense Item'
@AbapCatalog.enhancement.category : #NOT_EXTENSIBLE
@AbapCatalog.tableCategory : #TRANSPARENT
@AbapCatalog.deliveryClass : #A
@AbapCatalog.dataMaintenance : #RESTRICTED
define table zcla_exp_item {

  key client         : abap.clnt not null;
  key num_claim      : abap.numc(6) not null;
  key fiscalyear     : gjahr not null;
  key item_num       : abap.numc(5) not null;
  date_post          : abap.dats;
  event_description  : abap.char(128);
  category           : abap.char(64);
  currency           : waers;
  amount             : abap.dec(23,2);
  local_last_changed : abp_locinst_lastchange_tstmpl;

}

Here is the behavior definition also 

managed implementation in class zbp_i_cla_exp_header unique;
strict ( 2 );

define behavior for ZI_CLA_EXP_HEADER //alias <alias_name>
persistent table zcla_exp_h
lock master
authorization master ( instance )
early numbering
//etag master <field_name>
{
  create ( authorization : global );
  update;
  delete;
  field ( readonly ) NumClaim;
  association _items { create; }
}

define behavior for ZI_CLA_EXP_ITEM //alias <alias_name>
persistent table zcla_exp_item
lock dependent by _header
authorization dependent by _header
//etag master <field_name>
{
  update;
  delete;
  field ( readonly ) NumClaim;
  association _header;
}

 

Thank you for the attention

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Is there an option to use the cdsview I_ACTUALPLANJOURNALENTRYITEM, but with Delta extraction ?
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I need a CDSView to use in DataSphere, I will replace the BW 0CO_OM_CCA_9(COVP, COSP Tables) and 0CO_OM_OPA_6(COEP Table).

I thought about using I_ACTUALPLANJOURNALENTRYITEM(ACDOCA), but there's no delta capture in that CDSView.

Thanks.

Regards.

entry.title: Unable to configure outbound connectivity for API_PRODUCT_SRV in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently working on a requirement in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition related to Production Order documentation.

Business Requirement

The business needs to populate the inspection text maintained in the material master into the "Documents Libératoires" section of the Production Order form.

Since the inspection text is maintained on the product and needs to be available during production execution, we investigated several standard and extensibility options.

Analysis Performed

1. Text Determination

We initially explored standard Text Determination functionality to copy text from Material/BOM to the Production Order.

After discussions with the functional team, this approach was not suitable for retrieving the required inspection text.

2. CDS-Based Solution

We then analyzed available CDS views to retrieve the inspection text.

However, we could not identify a CDS view exposing this information, and SAP confirmed that no suitable CDS view is currently available.

3. Custom Field Workaround

As an alternative, we created a custom field to store the required inspection information so that it would be available through CDS-based reporting and extensions.

Unfortunately, the value is not consistently updated after saving the product, making this approach unreliable.

4. SAP Recommended Approach

SAP recommended retrieving the data through API_PRODUCT_SRV.

We therefore started implementing an outbound integration scenario.

Technical Steps Performed

Development

  1. Created package Z_DEV_API_SUB_PKG
  2. Defined outbound service ZINS_OUT_SRV_REST
  3. Created communication scenario ZINSP_CS
  4. Downloaded the EDMX metadata from SAP Business Accelerator Hub
  5. Generated Service Consumption Model ZINSP_TEXT_SCM_1
  6. Generated proxy class ZCLINSP_TEXT_SCM_1
  7. Developed ABAP console application ZCL_INSPECTION_TEXT

Configuration

  1. Created communication user CPI_PP_PROD
  2. Created communication system CPI_PRODUCT_INTEGRATION
  3. Started configuring the communication arrangement

Current Issue

During the outbound connectivity configuration, we are unable to identify how to create or assign the required outbound user for the API call.

This is preventing us from completing the integration based on API_PRODUCT_SRV.

Questions

  1. Has anyone successfully consumed API_PRODUCT_SRV from custom ABAP in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
  2. What is the correct approach for configuring outbound connectivity and authentication in this scenario?
  3. Is there a standard communication scenario that should be used instead of a custom one?
  4. How should the outbound user be created or assigned when consuming API_PRODUCT_SRV from ABAP Cloud?
  5. Is there an alternative recommended approach to retrieve inspection text maintained in the product master?

Any guidance, configuration examples, or lessons learned would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your support.

Best regards.

entry.title: Update Processor through FIN_WF_AGENT BADI for Verify General Journal Entries Workflow
entry.content:
Hi Community Members,

I have implemented the BADI - FIN_WF_AGENT using the Custom Logic FIORI app in order to update the processor for Verify General Journal Entries workflow/

My requirement is to be able to dynamically assign processors for Verify General JE Workflow requests. I have a CBO where the list of approvers are maintained for each of the submitter (here submitter is the one who creates the JE using the Verify General JE FIORI app).

In the Manage Workflow for Verify General JE, we have added a deadline option which trigger after 1 minute of Step. And the initial recipient is another user (of type BP employee). This user (let's say USER_APRV) is also listed in the Manage Teams & Responsibilities FIORI app.

Now, when a new request is raised, initially the processor is set as USER_APRV. However, as the deadline callback class is triggered after 1 minute, the BADI implementation is also triggered and the processor gets updated. Inside the BADI the "old_agent" is replaced by the "new_agent".  Currently, the "new_agent" value is hard-coded. However, the requirement is that the "new_agent" should be determined by selecting the appropriate approver from the designated CBO based on the submitter of the request.

In the ABAP call stack, I can see that the method "if_swf_flex_ifs_run_appl_step~on_deadline_action_callback" of the class "CL_FDC_ACCDOC_VER_FLEX_RUN_APP" is being called and it contains the  workflow task id ("IV_TASK_WI_ID") as an importing parameter to the class. This task id can be used to query the CDS C_GLJRNLENTRYTOBEVERIFIED  to get the Journal entry detail along with the submitter.

Here comes the issue! Since the task id is an importing parameter and local to the class, I cannot read it using a dirty assignment technique. Also, I have using several other class-methods / Function modules to get the work-item id from the stack or the memory but nothing was successful.

If anyone has had such a requirement and was able to achieve this, it would be really helpful for me if you can share your insights.

Thank you,
Sayak

SAP Business Workflow  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Finance

entry.title: How to Link Two Analytical Queries in Embedded SAC App? "A linked dimension" Error
entry.content:
How to Link Two Analytical Queries in Embedded SAC App?
"A linked dimension for this model is not included in the visualization's dimension bindings" Error

I am creating an Embedded SAC Application in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and trying to link two Analytical Queries using Company Code. Both Company Code fields have the same data type, semantics, and values, and the link is created successfully.

However, the widget shows the error:

"A linked dimension for this model is not included in the visualization's dimension bindings."

How can I correctly connect/link these two queries? Is there any additional configuration required for linked dimensions or dimension bindings?

entry.title: How to Identify Key Fields from a Released CDS View in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and need to retrieve metadata for a released CDS view, specifically the fields that are defined as key fields.

Currently, I am using the following ABAP code to retrieve the field/component information:

DATA(lo_struct) = CAST cl_abap_structdescr(
                    cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_name( p_tabname )
                  ).

 

DATA(lt_dfies_c) = lo_struct->get_components( ).

This successfully returns the components/fields of the CDS view structure. However, I do not see any information indicating whether a field is defined as a KEY in the CDS view.

My requirement is to programmatically determine which fields are key fields for a released CDS view in the ABAP Cloud/Public Cloud environment.

Could anyone advise:

  • Is there a supported API or class in ABAP Cloud to retrieve CDS metadata including key-field information?
  •  
  • Are there any restrictions in SAP Public Cloud that prevent access to CDS key definitions at runtime?

    Any guidance or recommended approach would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: In RAP how to filter an association via button
entry.content:
Hello All,

I do not find any answer online.  So I hope you can help me out.
I got a RAP app which contains of some CDS Views in parent child relation and some "normal" associations.
Each Entity has its own UUID and a reference to the root entity.
This root UUID is used to associate to a foreign CDS and all entries are displayed within all entities.
I now want one button which takes the UUID of the specific entity and filters the data of the association accordingly
A short coding example

define root table entity rootEntity
{
  key key  : key;
      uuid : uui;

      @ObjectModel               : {
        sort.enabled             : false,
        filter.enabled           : false
      }
      _Child : composition of exact one to many children;
     
      @ObjectModel               : {
       sort.enabled              : false,
       filter.enabled            : false
      }
      _foreign : association of exact one to many foreigns on $projection.uuid = _Activities.uuid_root_reference;
}

 Child

define table entity child
{
  key parent_key : key;
  key key        : key;
      uuid       : /uuid;

      @ObjectModel:{
        sort.enabled: false,
        filter.enabled: false
      }
      _parent : association to parent parent on $projection.parent_key = parent.key;
      
}

 on Consumption level

root

define root view entity c_parent
  provider contract transactional_query
  as projection on parent

{
  key     key   as Key,
          uuid  as UUID,
          @ObjectModel:{
             sort.enabled: false,
             filter.enabled: false
           }
          _Child : redirected to composition child c_children;

          @ObjectModel:{
            sort.enabled: false,
            filter.enabled: false
          }
          _foreign : redirected to c_foreign

}

 child

define view entity c_children
  as projection on children

  association of exact one to many c_foreigns as _foreigns on $projection.parentUUID = _foreigns.UUIDRootReference

{
  key key as Key,
  key parent_key as ParentKey,
      _parent.uuid as parentUUID,
      uuid,
         
      _parent : redirected to parent  c_parent,
      _foreigns
  
}

in parent and child bdef I now want to have this:

 action (features : instance) filterByUUID result [0..*] entity c_foreigns;
side effects {
    action filterByUUID affects entity _foreigns;
  }

The foreigns association is linked as line item reference and does not contain a filterbar.

{
        id                : 'Foreigns',
        purpose           : #STANDARD,
        position          : 10,
        label             : 'Foreigns',
        type              :  #LINEITEM_REFERENCE,
        targetElement     : '_foreigns'
      },

 In coding i want somethind like this:

READ ENTITIES OF parent IN LOCAL MODE
      ENTITY parent
      FIELDS ( uuid )
      WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
      RESULT DATA(lt_parents).

        LOOP AT keys ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_key>).

          LOOP AT lt_parents REFERENCE INTO DATA(lr_parent).

            SELECT
              *

            FROM
              foreigns

            WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS

            WHERE
              uuid_root_reference = @LR_parent->uuid

            APPENDING TO TABLE
              @result.


          ENDLOOP.

      ENDLOOP.

 any hint how to achieve that I can filter the foreigns for the current entities uuid would be nice.
Thank you in advance and best regards.

Matthias
